mapper.select: SELECT * FROM NOTICE ORDER BY CASE WHEN TOP_YN = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CREATE_DATE DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTICE SET NOTICE_TITLE = #{noticeTitle}, NOTICE_CONTENT = #{noticeContent}, TOP_YN = #{topYn}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE NOTICE_NO = #{noticeNo}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM NOTICE WHERE TOP_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY CREATE_DATE DESC
SELECT * FROM NOTICE ORDER BY CASE WHEN TOP_YN = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CREATE_DATE DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM NOTICE WHERE NOTICE_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY CASE WHEN TOP_YN = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CREATE_DATE DESC
